Title: Regional listing pages emit 429 and failed data/resource errors in browser console
URL: https://evlek.app/kiralik/girne; https://evlek.app/satilik/lefkosa; https://evlek.app/kiralik/lefkosa; https://evlek.app/satilik/iskele; https://evlek.app/satilik/gazimagusa; https://evlek.app/kiralik/gazimagusa; https://evlek.app/satilik/guzelyurt; https://evlek.app/kiralik/guzelyurt; https://evlek.app/satilik/lefke; https://evlek.app/kiralik/lefke; https://evlek.app/girne; https://evlek.app/lefkosa; https://evlek.app/gazimagusa; https://evlek.app/iskele
Device/Browser: Desktop Chrome and Mobile Chrome / Playwright desktop-chromium and mobile-chrome
Steps To Reproduce: 1. Open https://evlek.app/. 2. Navigate through internal regional listing and city guide links, or run npm run test:audit -- --project=desktop-chromium and npm run test:audit -- --project=mobile-chrome. 3. Observe browser console while visiting the affected pages.
Expected Result: Pages should load without failed dependent resources, failed data fetches, or browser console errors.
Actual Result: Pages return HTTP 200, but browser console logs failed dependent resource/data requests with HTTP 429 on regional pages. Mobile /kiralik/girne also logs property-count and property-fetch failures.
Screenshot/Video: Evidence is available in local Playwright reports/test-results from the audit run; do not commit generated evidence files to the public repo.
Suggested Fix: Review backend/API rate limiting and cache behavior for resources loaded by regional listing pages. Ensure normal browsing and QA crawling do not trigger 429s for required page assets or data requests; add caching, request batching, retry/backoff, or adjusted throttling where appropriate.

Title: Fiyat Endeksi page meta description is longer than recommended SEO threshold
Steps To Reproduce: 1. Run npm run test:seo -- --project=desktop-chromium. 2. Review seo-encoding-results.json for https://evlek.app/fiyat-endeksi.
Expected Result: Meta description should be concise and stay at or under the configured 180-character SEO threshold.
Actual Result: The meta description is 182 characters: KKTC şehir ve semt bazında doğrulanmış aktif ilanlara dayalı medyan metrekare fiyatı, tipik fiyat bandı ve veri metodolojisi. IQR ile temizlenmiş, günlük güncellenen bağımsız endeks.
Suggested Fix: Shorten the meta description slightly while preserving the main keywords, for example by removing one adjective or combining the methodology phrase.
